displayTitle: Rebels: Path Of The Jedi (cinestory comic)
synopsis: If you’re a Jedi struggling with your identity you can always count on taking a trip to your local ancient temple (or tree) for answers. In the Star Wars Rebels episode “Path of the Jedi” Ezra and Kanan visit the Jedi temple on Lothal for guidance. This cinestory comic book captures all of the beautiful screencaps from that spiritual journey.
title: Rebels: Path Of The Jedi (cinestory comic)
